originalTitle: Avengers: Doomsday Trailer BREAKDOWN - Marvel Easter Eggs You Missed!
content: Go to https://san.com/screencrush/ to get the unbiased truth on the stories that matter, only on the Straight Arrow app. Let’s exit the echo chamber. Visit the ScreenCrush Merch Store to find fan merch that we designed just for you. From T-shirts to unique accessories, find your favorites. For 15% off your first order subscribe here! https://screencrushmerch.com/pages/subscribe Avengers: Doomsday Trailer Breakdown! The first trailer for Doomsday is here, with our first look at Robert Downey Jr's Dr Doom facing off against the Avengers, Fantastic Four, and the X-Men! ScreenCrush breaks down all of the Marvel easter eggs you missed, plus some hidden surprises Marvel was holding back for this trailer.
